positive: Stylized celestial tapestry featuring a mystical compass rose intersecting with cosmic wildlife silhouettes. The primary elements include a majestic, stylized ouroboros serpent coiled around a glowing, segmented moon, intertwined with bioluminescent galactic flora and delicate, crystalline star constellations. Composition should be centered and balanced, ideal for a single-repeat apparel graphic. Use a deep indigo and sapphire blue color palette contrasted sharply with electric neon teal, vibrant gold, and pops of magenta. The art style should be highly detailed vector illustration meets Art Nouveau etching, featuring clean, bold outlines, strong contrast, and a high-gloss, poster-print finish. Cinematic studio lighting, perfect symmetry, isolated on a clean, neutral background.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, low resolution, watermark, signature, messy, dirty, text, human, logo, writing, poorly drawn hands, bad anatomy, multiple limbs
